svg.title: Galerina / TritMesh — the .hypha Query Lane (T-ZONE)
svg.desc: A .hypha (TritMeshQL) query is parsed once into typed value-leaves (injection-proof). Opaque coordinate predicates run in the UNTRUSTED index before the Gate; the Gate verifies integrity and requires a K3 ALLOW before any decryption; every semantic operation runs in the TRUSTED zone after the Gate. No semantic field ever crosses to the left of the Gate. Cross-collection traversal is GATED on the signed graph-spine.
svg.text: Galerina / TritMesh — the .hypha Query Lane
Zone-typed reads · amber = UNTRUSTED (opaque, pre-Gate) · blue = the Gate · teal = TRUSTED (semantic, post-Gate) · purple = invariant
the .hypha query — parsed ONCE into a typed AST (read-only by SAFE-set: RETURN/SELECT/SHOW/DESCRIBE/LIST)
RETURN doc_id, ssn FROM patients FILTER: [where x=3] FILTER: [where label="report"] REDACT ssn LIMIT 5
values = inert leaves · no string→query
UNTRUSTED ZONE — the coordinate index
no decrypted content is ever touched here
IndexScan { opaque pushdown }
x = 3 · z RANGE (0,9)
only all-opaque conjuncts push down
a semantic field here ⇒ REJECT (fail closed)
THE GATE
verify-before-decrypt · K3 ALLOW · UNKNOWN⇒DENY
TRUSTED ZONE — after the Gate
every semantic operation lives here
Filter { semantic residual } · label = "report"
Traverse { JOIN/MATCH } — GATED on the signed spine
ANN (NEAREST)
Project + REDACT :cut
Order → Limit → Offset → rows out
semantic field egresses only redacted (:cut) or to a trusted destination
this Gate IS the .gate K3 Gate — one authorization boundary
a query is a sub-map that merges into the one GIR (RD-0243)
The invariants (machine-checked by the reference checker — RD-0246)
① no semantic field before the Gate (T-ZONE) · ② injection-proof by construction (typed leaves, one statement) · ③ read-only by SAFE-set
④ unknown field/edge ⇒ REJECT · ⑤ JOIN GATED on the SIGNED spine — topology proves REACH, the Gate proves AUTHORIZATION (RD-0150/0167)
Verdicts: PASS (safe + shippable) · GATED (safe syntax, blocked on the signed spine) · REJECT (fail-closed)
[DESIGN] — grammar v2 (RD-0243/0244); reference checker hypha-check.mjs (51/51, 3 adversarial rounds). Writes are a separate governed path, never the QL.
